hero.title: Radiant Waves Media Late Night Global News
hero.description: Late-night roundup of major headlines, breaking developments and key events from Nigeria and around the world.

breaking: 🔴 MKO Abiola collapsed during meeting with U.S. envoys and was not poisoned, says Abdulsalami Abubakar
🔴 Peter Obi says there is no reason to continue detaining Nnamdi Kanu
🔴 Defence Minister says local informants are fueling terrorist operations in Nigeria
🔴 Federal Government may begin salary payments through eNaira platform, according to reports
🔴 Europe continues migration policy reforms and border security discussions
🔴 Middle East security and diplomatic developments remain top global concerns
🔴 Global markets remain cautious amid inflation and geopolitical uncertainty
🔴 China advances AI, technology and industrial modernization initiatives

featured.title: Nigeria Security Concerns And Global Geopolitical Developments Dominate Headlines
featured.content: Late-night discussions across the globe remain focused on security challenges, migration policies, economic reforms and diplomatic efforts. In Nigeria, insecurity, political developments and economic policy proposals continue attracting national attention.

articles.title: Middle East Remains Center Of International Attention
articles.description: Security developments, diplomatic efforts and humanitarian concerns continue shaping global discussions as governments monitor regional stability and energy market implications.

articles.title: Europe Continues Migration And Border Security Reforms
articles.description: European governments remain engaged in discussions over migration management, asylum policies, deportation agreements and border security measures.

articles.title: United States Monitors Global Security And Economic Trends
articles.description: American officials continue focusing on economic performance, trade policy, technology leadership and international security partnerships.

articles.title: Canada Addresses Housing And Immigration Challenges
articles.description: Canadian policymakers continue balancing immigration targets, labor market demands and housing affordability concerns.

articles.title: Defence Minister Blames Local Informants For Aiding Terror Operations
articles.description: Nigeria's Defence Minister has warned that local informants continue to provide critical support to terrorist and criminal groups, complicating military operations across affected regions.

articles.title: Peter Obi Calls For End To Nnamdi Kanu's Detention
articles.description: Labour Party presidential candidate Peter Obi has stated that there is no justification for the continued detention of Nnamdi Kanu, urging authorities to pursue lawful and peaceful resolutions.

articles.title: Abdulsalami Speaks On MKO Abiola's Final Hours
articles.description: Former Head of State General Abdulsalami Abubakar said MKO Abiola collapsed during a meeting with visiting United States envoys and was not poisoned, addressing long-standing public speculation.

articles.title: Federal Government Reportedly Considering eNaira Salary Payments
articles.description: Reports indicate the Federal Government may explore salary payments through the eNaira platform as part of broader efforts to strengthen digital financial systems.

articles.title: Soludo's Wife And Fidelity Bank Empower 2,000 Women And Children
articles.description: An empowerment initiative involving the wife of Anambra State Governor Chukwuma Soludo and Fidelity Bank has reportedly provided support to over 2,000 women and children across the state.

articles.title: NSCDC, NIS And NCoS Recruitment Lists Released
articles.description: Authorities have released the list of successful applicants for recruitment exercises conducted by the Nigeria Security and Civil Defence Corps, Nigeria Immigration Service and Nigerian Correctional Service.

articles.title: Two Injured After Trailer Falls From Anambra Bridge
articles.description: Two people sustained injuries after a trailer reportedly fell from a bridge in Anambra State and crashed into vehicles below, causing significant damage.

articles.title: PFI Credits Early Procurement For Fertiliser Supply Stability
articles.description: Agricultural stakeholders say early procurement strategies helped maintain fertilizer availability and stabilize supplies during the farming season.

articles.title: ZLP Senatorial Aspirant Promises Citizen-Centered Representation
articles.description: A senatorial aspirant under the Zenith Labour Party has pledged to prioritize citizen-focused policies and grassroots engagement for residents of the Federal Capital Territory.

articles.title: Asia Expands Technology And Manufacturing Investments
articles.description: Asian economies continue investing in industrial development, digital infrastructure and innovation programs aimed at supporting long-term growth.

articles.title: China Advances Artificial Intelligence And Semiconductor Development
articles.description: Chinese authorities continue supporting strategic technology sectors including artificial intelligence, semiconductor manufacturing and advanced industrial capabilities.

articles.title: Global Markets Watch Inflation And Geopolitical Risks
articles.description: Investors remain focused on inflation trends, energy prices, international conflicts and economic policy decisions that may affect global growth.

sponsoredAdverts.subtitle: Natural Wellness Solution
sponsoredAdverts.description: Stonebreaker Herbal Mixture is prepared from carefully selected natural ingredients traditionally used for wellness support and natural body cleansing.

sponsoredAdverts.title: FARM TO KITCHEN 🌶️

sponsoredAdverts.description: Premium freshly ground spice blends prepared for homes, restaurants and catering services. Freshness and flavor in every package.
